question: Which country has the most of TV Channels? List the country and number of TV Channels it has.

reasoner_decision.candidate_sql_contract:
SELECT Country, COUNT(*) AS NumberOfTVChannels
FROM TV_Channel
GROUP BY Country
ORDER BY NumberOfTVChannels DESC
LIMIT 1;
reasoner_decision.candidate_sql_oneshot:
SELECT Country, COUNT(*) AS NumberOfTVChannels
FROM TV_Channel
GROUP BY Country
ORDER BY NumberOfTVChannels DESC
LIMIT 1;

final_sql:
SELECT Country, COUNT(*) AS NumberOfTVChannels
FROM TV_Channel
GROUP BY Country
ORDER BY NumberOfTVChannels DESC
LIMIT 1;

question: What is the country with the most number of TV Channels and how many does it have?

reasoner_decision.candidate_sql_contract:
SELECT Country, COUNT(*) AS Channel_Count
FROM TV_Channel
GROUP BY Country
ORDER BY Channel_Count DESC
LIMIT 1;
reasoner_decision.candidate_sql_oneshot:
SELECT Country, COUNT(*) AS Channel_Count
FROM TV_Channel
GROUP BY Country
ORDER BY Channel_Count DESC
LIMIT 1;

final_sql:
SELECT Country, COUNT(*) AS Channel_Count
FROM TV_Channel
GROUP BY Country
ORDER BY Channel_Count DESC
LIMIT 1;

question: List the number of different series names and contents in the TV Channel table.

reasoner_decision.candidate_sql_contract: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT series_name), COUNT(DISTINCT Content) FROM TV_Channel;

final_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT series_name), COUNT(DISTINCT Content) FROM TV_Channel;

What is the TV Channel that shows the cartoon "The Rise of the Blue Beetle!"? List the TV Channel's series name.

reasoner_decision.candidate_sql_contract:
SELECT T1.series_name 
FROM TV_Channel AS T1 
JOIN Cartoon AS T2 
ON T1.id = T2.Channel 
WHERE LOWER(T2.Title) = LOWER('The Rise of the Blue Beetle!');
reasoner_decision.candidate_sql_oneshot:
SELECT T1.series_name 
FROM TV_Channel AS T1 
JOIN Cartoon AS T2 
ON T1.id = T2.Channel 
WHERE T2.Title = 'The Rise of the Blue Beetle!';

final_sql:
SELECT T1.series_name 
FROM TV_Channel AS T1 
JOIN Cartoon AS T2 
ON T1.id = T2.Channel 
WHERE T2.Title = 'The Rise of the Blue Beetle!';
